tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions vectors and constants but not trunc/zext chains that create known zero bits through type conversion. This tests KnownBits propagation through truncation followed by zero-extension.

alive2.tgt:
; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

define i1 @trunc_zext_chain_known_bits(i64 %x) {
  %z = and i64 %x, 4294901760
  %cmp = icmp eq i64 %z, 0
  ret i1 %cmp
}
alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i1 @trunc_zext_chain_known_bits(i64 %x) {
#0:
  %t = trunc i64 %x to i32
  %z = zext i32 %t to i64
  %cmp = icmp ult i64 %z, 65536
  ret i1 %cmp
}
=>
define i1 @trunc_zext_chain_known_bits(i64 %x) {
#0:
  %z = and i64 %x, 4294901760
  %cmp = icmp eq i64 %z, 0
  ret i1 %cmp
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary discusses constant expressions and globals but not select instructions creating bounded value ranges. KnownBits can determine select output range [0,255] making >300 always false.

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i1 @select_bounded_range_comparison(i32 %x, i1 %cond) {
#0:
  %sel = select i1 %cond, i32 0, i32 255
  %cmp = icmp ugt i32 %sel, 300
  ret i1 %cmp
}
=>
define i1 @select_bounded_range_comparison(i32 %x, i1 %cond) {
#0:
  ret i1 0
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions vector shifts but not explicit bit masking patterns with AND instructions. KnownBits analysis recognizes masked value max is 255, making >=512 always false.

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i1 @and_mask_upper_bits_zero(i32 %x) {
#0:
  %masked = and i32 %x, 255
  %cmp = icmp uge i32 %masked, 512
  ret i1 %cmp
}
=>
define i1 @and_mask_upper_bits_zero(i32 %x) {
#0:
  ret i1 0
}
Transformation seems to be correct!
